message.content:
@startuml
title Удаление объекта недвижимости

actor user as U
participant MobileApp as MA
database "DB MobileApp" as DBMA
participant BACK as BACK
database "DB BACK" as DBBACK

U -> MA : Инициация удаления объекта(ов) недвижимости
activate MA

MA -> BACK : request: deleteAddress (userId, [addressId])
activate BACK

loop для каждого элемента [addressId]
  BACK -> DBBACK : request: deleteAddress (userId, addressId)
  activate DBBACK
  DBBACK --> BACK : response: deleteAddress (success)
  deactivate DBBACK
end

BACK -> DBBACK : request: getAllUserData (userId)
activate DBBACK
DBBACK --> BACK : response: getAllUserData (userId, userData)
deactivate DBBACK

BACK --> MA : response: getAllUserData (userData)
deactivate BACK

MA -> DBMA : [обновление временных данных userData]
MA -> MA : обновление представления клиента

MA --> U : Обновлённый экран
deactivate MA

@enduml
